title: Wrinkle Witch Website & Multi-App Platform
summary: Static site, FastAPI backend, Streamlit admin, scheduled jobs; Square Bookings, referrals, specials.

title: Wrinkle Witch CRM
summary: Modular Streamlit CRM: product database, data pipelines, extensible for referrals and Square.

title: Referral Tracker Module
summary: Referral tracking, PDF cards, session-state control, CSV sync; integrated in the multi-app platform.

title: Agricultural Forecasting Dashboard
summary: Crop yield forecasting with regression, ARIMA, EDA, and Matplotlib visualizations.

title: Continuous Learning AI Framework
summary: Experimental AI evolution: knowledge bases, checkpointing, rollback, rule-based adaptation.

title: Toy Blockchain
summary: Proof-of-work, transaction pool, and node sync in Python.

title: Power BI Non-Profit Dashboard
summary: Multi-page dashboard for donor, event, and volunteer metrics with scalable data model.
